ext_name.description: Extension name shown in browser UI

ext_short_name.description: Short name shown where space is limited

ext_description.message: Quick access to your WordPress sites, content editing, and developer tools. Tuck away the admin bar.
ext_description.description: Extension description shown in the browser's extension store and management pages. The Chrome Web Store shows it as the listing summary and enforces a 132-character limit.

ext_action_title.description: Tooltip for the toolbar icon button

cmd_edit_this_page.description: Description for the keyboard shortcut command

options_page_title.description: HTML page title for the options page

options_heading.description: H1 heading on the options page

options_subtitle.message: Browser-wide defaults. Per-site choices still live in the toolbar popup.
options_subtitle.description: Subtitle under the options page heading

options_admin_bar_section.description: Section heading for admin bar settings

options_hide_admin_bar_label.description: Toggle label for the hide-admin-bar option

options_hide_admin_bar_hint.message: When enabled, the admin bar starts hidden on new WordPress sites. Per-site preferences in the popup still take precedence.
options_hide_admin_bar_hint.description: Hint text describing the hide-admin-bar toggle behavior

options_site_info_label.description: Toggle label for the site information panel option

options_site_info_hint.message: Adds a panel to the popup that surfaces the active theme, installed plugins, site name, and REST namespaces. Detection is heuristic — asset-path inference can produce duplicates and false positives (for example mu-plugins and drop-ins). Off by default.
options_site_info_hint.description: Hint text describing the site information panel feature

options_data_section.description: Section heading for data management settings

options_reset_label.description: Label for the reset/clear data option

options_reset_hint.message: Clears every saved per-site preference, the global defaults on this page, and the cached "is this a WordPress site" results. Useful for testing or starting fresh.
options_reset_hint.description: Hint text describing what the reset action clears

options_clear_button.description: Button label to trigger clearing all extension data

options_clear_confirm.message:
Clear all extension data?

This removes every saved per-site preference, the global defaults on this page, the cached WordPress detection results, and your saved My Sites list. Cannot be undone.
options_clear_confirm.description: Confirmation dialog text shown before clearing all data

options_cleared_success.description: Status message shown after successfully clearing extension data

options_cleared_error.message: Could not clear data. Try again.
options_cleared_error.description: Status message shown when clearing extension data fails

toolbar_title_detected.description: Toolbar icon tooltip when a WordPress site is detected but the user is not logged in

toolbar_title_detected_logged_in.description: Toolbar icon tooltip when a WordPress site is detected and the user is logged in

toolbar_title_default.description: Default toolbar icon tooltip when no WordPress site is detected

admin_bar_hidden_notice.message: [WordPress Browser Extension] Admin bar hidden on this site. Toggle "Show Admin Bar" in the extension popup or the options page.
admin_bar_hidden_notice.description: Console info message shown when the admin bar is hidden on a site

error_view_title.description: Title shown in the popup error state

error_view_description.description: Description shown in the popup error state

not_supported_title.description: Title shown when the current tab cannot be inspected (e.g. new tab, browser pages)

not_supported_description.message: Open a website to get started.
not_supported_description.description: Description shown when the current tab cannot be inspected

not_wordpress_title.description: Title shown when the current site is not detected as WordPress

not_wordpress_description.description: Description shown when the current site is not detected as WordPress

verb_view.description: Verb prefix for viewing a published post/page from the WP admin edit screen

verb_preview.description: Verb prefix for previewing a draft post/page from the WP admin edit screen

visit_site.description: Button label to visit the WordPress site's frontend

wordpress_admin.description: Button label to open the WordPress admin dashboard

log_in.description: Button label to log into a WordPress site

log_in_return.description: Button label to log in and return to the current page

show_admin_bar.description: Toggle label to show/hide the WordPress admin bar

admin_bar_disabled_info.message: Admin bar appears to be disabled by your profile or theme, which limits this extension.
admin_bar_disabled_info.description: Info text shown when the admin bar cannot be toggled due to profile or theme settings

check_profile_link.description: Link text directing users to their WordPress profile settings

copy_url_label.description: Aria-label and tooltip for the copy URL button

copied_label.description: Aria-label and tooltip for the copy URL button after the URL has been copied

open_new_tab_label.description: Aria-label and tooltip for the open-in-new-tab button

account_menu_label.description: Aria-label for the user account menu button when no display name is available

account_menu_for_user.description: Aria-label for the user account menu button when a display name is available

profile_menu_item.description: Menu item linking to the user's WordPress profile

gravatar_menu_item.description: Menu item linking to the user's Gravatar profile

log_out_button.description: Button label to log out of the WordPress site

confirm_click_button.description: Button label shown after first click on a destructive action, prompting a second confirmation click

super_admin_role.description: Role badge label for WordPress multisite super administrators

new_content_label.description: Section label for the 'New content' action group in the popup

dev_tools_label.description: Section label for the developer tools group in the popup

highlight_blocks_toggle.description: Toggle label for the block highlighter developer tool

mobile_preview_action.description: Action label to open the site in mobile preview mode

bypass_page_cache_action.description: Action label to reload the page bypassing the server-side page cache

query_monitor_toggle.description: Toggle label for the Query Monitor plugin panel

clear_site_data_action.description: Action label to clear browser site data while preserving the login session

confirm_label.description: Default label for inline confirmation buttons

site_info_label.description: Section label for the site information panel

site_info_loading.description: Aria-live status text while site information is being fetched

active_theme_label.description: Label for the active theme row in the site information panel

plugins_label.description: Section label for the plugins group when the count is zero or unknown

plugins_with_count.description: Section label for plugins when the total count is known from REST

detected_plugins_with_count.description: Section label for plugins detected via DOM asset paths when REST count is unavailable

login_for_plugin_list.message: Log in for a comprehensive list of plugins with additional information.
login_for_plugin_list.description: Hint shown in the plugins section when the user is logged out

nothing_detected.description: Hint shown when no additional site information could be detected

login_for_info.description: Hint shown in the theme section when the user is logged out

update_singular.description: Status badge label for a single pending WordPress update

update_plural.description: Status badge label for multiple pending WordPress updates

pending_comment_singular.description: Status badge label for a single comment awaiting moderation

pending_comment_plural.description: Status badge label for multiple comments awaiting moderation

edit_category.description: Edit action label when viewing a category archive

edit_tag.description: Edit action label when viewing a tag archive

edit_term.description: Edit action label when viewing a taxonomy term archive

edit_author.description: Edit action label when viewing an author archive

edit_page_fallback.description: Fallback edit action label when the post type cannot be determined

edit_term_not_resolvable.description: Disabled edit action label when the term cannot be resolved to an edit URL

edit_author_not_resolvable.description: Disabled edit action label when the author cannot be resolved to an edit URL

nothing_to_edit.description: Disabled edit action label for pages with no editable content (e.g. search results, 404)

edit_post_type.description: Edit action label prefixed with the post type name (e.g. 'Edit Post', 'Edit Page')

post_type_post.description: Display name for the 'post' post type

post_type_page.description: Display name for the 'page' post type

post_type_media.description: Display name for the 'attachment' post type

post_type_block_pattern.description: Display name for the 'wp_block' post type (reusable blocks)

post_type_template.description: Display name for the 'wp_template' post type

post_type_template_part.description: Display name for the 'wp_template_part' post type

post_type_navigation_menu.description: Display name for the 'wp_navigation' post type

my_sites_label.description: Header for the saved-sites launcher section

my_sites_edit.description: Toggle that reveals rename/remove controls in the My Sites list

my_sites_done.description: Toggle that exits edit mode in the My Sites list

my_sites_remove.description: Button that removes a site from the My Sites list

my_sites_rename_placeholder.description: Placeholder/label for the rename field in the My Sites list

host_local_dev.description: Host badge label for a local development environment (the other host labels are brand names and are not translated)

edit_blog_template.description: Edit action label on the blog posts index (block theme) — opens the site editor

edit_archive_template.description: Edit action label on an archive view (block theme) — opens the site editor

edit_unavailable_classic.description: Disabled edit label on a template-backed view when the theme is classic (templates are PHP files)

edit_template_not_found.description: Disabled edit label when the block theme has no template matching the current view

edit_unavailable.description: Disabled edit label on a template-backed view when block-theme status can't be determined
